scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf build dist .svelte-kit node_modules/.vite-temp
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n latexd,core,app -c yellow,cyan,magenta "pnpm dev:latexd" "pnpm dev:viewer-core" "pnpm dev:viewer-app"
scripts.dev:latexd: sh -lc 'cd .. && cargo run -p latexd -- serve --root fixtures/arxiv-basic --compiler-bin internal'
